Package org.eventb.core.sc

Interface ISCFilterModule

All Superinterfaces:
IFilterModule, IModule
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextAxiomFreeIdentsModule, ContextAxiomTheoremModule, FormulaFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventActionFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventConvergenceModule, MachineEventExtendedModule, MachineEventGuardFreeIdentsModule, MachineEventGuardTheoremModule, MachineEventRefinesModule, MachineEventWitnessFreeIdentsModule, MachineFormulaFreeIdentsModule, MachineInvariantFreeIdentsModule, MachineInvariantTheoremModule, MachinePreviousEventLabelModule, MachineVariableFromParameterModule, MachineVariantFreeIdentsModule, SCFilterModule, TheoremModule
public interface ISCFilterModule extends IFilterModule
The processor modules of the static checker are used to accept (or reject) elements of a component. The use of the methods initModule(), process(), and endModule() are described in IModule.

The state and the state repository must be of types ISCState and ISCStateRepository to avoid accidental mixing of static checker and proof obligation generator state.

Since:
3.0
See Also:
  • IModule
  • IProcessorModule
  • ISCState
  • ISCStateRepository

  • Method Details

    • accept

      boolean accept(IRodinElement element, ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Runs the static checker module. Returns whether the element should be accepted. If an error marker was associated with the element the returned value should usually be false. Exceptions from this rule are possible, in particular, if the element has been already marked with an error.
      Parameters:
      element - the input "unchecked" element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Returns:
      whether the element should be accepted
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem running this module

    • initModule

      void initModule(ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Initialisation code for the module
      Parameters:
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem initialising this module

    • endModule

      void endModule(ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Termination code for the module
      Parameters:
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem terminating this module
